pi_items.source: Direct code analysis: setup_task.sh line 6, export_result.sh line 6, and task.json hooks reference
Code analysis: verifier.py line 48 defines required_year = '2026', task.json description line specifies '2026', setup creates files with this year
Code analysis: verifier.py line 49 defines required_owner = 'OpenInventory Contributors', task.json description specifies this exact owner name

Web verification via WebFetch confirms this is the official Apache License 2.0 URL from Apache Foundation. Code analysis: verifier.py line 50 defines required_url = 'http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0', task.json description includes this URL

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are verified. The task uses a synthetically generated Java project 'inventory-service' located at /home/ga/IdeaProjects/inventory-service. The copyright year is 2026, the copyright owner is 'OpenInventory Contributors', and the license URL is the official Apache License 2.0 URL (http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0) from the Apache Software Foundation. The task requires configuring IntelliJ IDEA to apply these copyright headers to Java files in the src/main/java directory.
